name: POST /api/projects/activate with human-readable name returns slug active_project_id (B1+B2 backend contract — PHASE-16 UNIFIED)
description: RED (before B1 fix): writeActiveProject('New NT') uses trim-only normalizeProjectId → response active_project_id='New NT' ≠ 'new_nt' → FAIL. GREEN (after B1 fix): normalizeProjectId slugifies → 'new_nt' → active_project_id_is_slug=true → PASS.
